title: The Young Tineye
description: Spook, Clubs' young nephew, works as a lookout and messenger for the crew at the carpentry shop, speaking in thick Eastern street slang.

title: Messenger Runs
description: Spook runs messages between Clubs' Shop in Luthadel and the Renoux estate in Fellise, his tin-enhanced senses making him an exceptional scout.

title: Watching Over Vin
description: Lestibournes watches over the injured Vin at Clubs' shop, present when she wakes up from her injuries sustained during the Kredik Shaw scouting mission. He now tells that he got a new name from Kelsier; Spook.

title: The Handkerchief
description: Spook visits the Renoux estate in Fellise and finds Vin reading the Lord Ruler's logbook. He tells her that Dockson came to get more weapons, and—flushed and nervous—gives her a handkerchief before dashing away. Sazed later explains to Vin that this is how a young man signals he would like to seriously court a lady.

title: Late Night at Clubs'
description: Spook shares a late-night drink at Clubs' shop with Kelsier, Ham, and Clubs while the crew discusses the status of the mission.

title: The Executions
description: Spook bursts into Clubs' shop to announce executions at Fountain Square. He joins the crew as they head to the square and witness the brutal public execution of skaa women and children, their blood emptied into the fountain.

title: Scouting the Rooftops
description: Spook scouts from the rooftop above Clubs' shop with Vin, teaching her tricks about using tin. He explains it's not just about enhancing senses but about sorting out what matters and not being distracted by the rest.

title: Tineye on Watch
description: When the crew goes to Fountain Square, Spook is spotted in one of the execution carts alongside Lord Renoux—captured by the Ministry.

title: Witnessing the Sacrifice
description: Spook watches from the crowd as Kelsier fights and dies in Fountain Square, an event that will shape the rest of his life. The Survivor's sacrifice transforms Spook's understanding of what it means to serve a cause.

title: The Revolution
description: Spook fights with the crew during the final revolution, helping coordinate the skaa uprising from the streets of Luthadel.

title: The Growing Scout
description: Spook returns to Luthadel from his scouting mission and rejoins the crew at Keep Venture. He resumes his role patrolling the city and observing the encircling armies.

title: Crew Gathering
description: Spook is present at Keep Venture as the crew regroups following the arrival of Cett's second army outside Luthadel.

title: War Council
description: Spook attends Elend's war council at Keep Venture, where the crew discusses strategy for dealing with two besieging armies and the growing threat beyond the walls.

title: Exile Group
description: Spook departs Luthadel with Vin and Elend's exile party through the Tin Gate, heading north toward the Terris mountains.

title: Surviving the Battle
description: After returning to Luthadel during the koloss attack, Spook survives the Battle of Luthadel and helps secure the city.

title: Campaign Soldier
description: Spook serves in Elend's army at Vetitan, gradually earning more responsibility as the emperor's forces secure the storage cache.

title: The Infiltrator
description: Spook arrives in Urteau ahead of Sazed's diplomatic mission, infiltrating the city through the tangle of dry canals known as the Harrows.

title: The Burning House
description: Spook establishes a base in a hidden building within the Harrows, watching the Citizen's oppressive regime and making contact with local resistance.

title: Market Observation
description: Spook observes Quellion the Citizen giving speeches in the Marketpit, studying his patterns and the Allomancers he forces to serve through Hemalurgic spikes.

title: Approaching the Citizen
description: Spook gets closer to the Citizen's inner circle, investigating the spikes Quellion uses to control Allomancers and gathering evidence of corruption.

title: Planning the Revolution
description: Working from his hideout, Spook coordinates with Sazed and local rebels to plan the overthrow of Quellion's regime and secure the storage cache.

title: Kelsier's Voice
description: Spook begins hearing what he believes is Kelsier's voice guiding him, driving him toward increasingly dangerous actions against the Citizen.

title: The Burning Building
description: Spook is spiked during a building fire, gaining enhanced Allomantic abilities but also becoming vulnerable to Ruin's influence through the spike.

title: Revelation
description: Spook realizes the voice he has been hearing is not Kelsier but Ruin, manipulating him through the Hemalurgic spike. He tears out the spike in agony.

title: Hero of Urteau
description: Spook leads the revolution against Quellion, exposing his corruption. As fires consume the city, Sazed floods the canals, saving Urteau from destruction.

title: Recovery
description: Badly burned but alive, Spook recovers as Urteau stabilizes under new leadership and supplies from the storage cache are distributed.

title: To the Pits
description: Spook travels to the Pits of Hathsin with the Urteau forces, joining the gathering armies for what will be the final battle.

title: A New World
description: Spook emerges into Sazed's remade world—a field of flowers and green grass beneath a blue sky. He carries Sazed's final words for the survivors.
